title: Enum-Indexed Planet Data Lookup
prompt_md:
## Goal
Map planet enumerators to their names using a `constexpr std::array` indexed by an unscoped enum, then look up the name for a selected planet. Use the enum-count idiom (a trailing `maxPlanets` enumerator) as the array size, and do the lookup by indexing the array -- not with a `switch` or `if/else` chain.

Planets in order: `0 Mercury`, `1 Venus`, `2 Earth`, `3 Mars`, `4 Jupiter`.

## Input
A single integer.

## Output
- If the integer names a valid planet, print `Planet: <Name>`.
- Otherwise print `Planet: Unknown`.

## Example
Input `2` produces `Planet: Earth`.

title: Student Grade Report Using Enum-Indexed Arrays
prompt_md:
## Goal
Use two parallel `constexpr` `std::array`s -- one of subject names, one of passing thresholds -- both indexed by the same unscoped enum, to grade a student. For each subject, decide Pass/Fail and finally report how many subjects were passed. Look everything up by enum index; do not use a `switch`.

Subjects (in order) with their passing thresholds:
```
Math     50
Science  55
English  45
History  50
```
A subject passes when the score is >= its threshold.

## Input
Four integers (each 0-100), one per line: the scores for Math, Science, English, History in that order.

## Output
- Four lines, one per subject: `<SubjectName>: <score> - Pass` or `<SubjectName>: <score> - Fail`.
- A final line: `Passed: <count>/4`.

## Example
Input `60`, `40`, `45`, `80` produces:
```
Math: 60 - Pass
Science: 40 - Fail
English: 45 - Pass
History: 80 - Pass
Passed: 3/4
```

test_cases.label: Sample -- mixed pass and fail
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Math: 60 - Pass
Science: 40 - Fail
English: 45 - Pass
History: 80 - Pass
Passed: 3/4

test_cases.label: Hidden -- all pass at exact thresholds
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Math: 50 - Pass
Science: 55 - Pass
English: 45 - Pass
History: 50 - Pass
Passed: 4/4

test_cases.label: Hidden -- all fail (one below each threshold)
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Math: 49 - Fail
Science: 54 - Fail
English: 44 - Fail
History: 49 - Fail
Passed: 0/4

test_cases.label: Hidden -- only science and history pass
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Math: 10 - Fail
Science: 90 - Pass
English: 10 - Fail
History: 100 - Pass
Passed: 2/4
